content: Backend: Add find_folder_by_phone() to services/drive.py (drive.files.list with q + supportsAllDrives + includeItemsFromAllDrives)
Backend: Update registration.py — add phone validation + normalize, branch logic (find-or-create folder), new folder name `[phone] - [child] - [parent]`
Backend: Update email_service.py — subject changes to `[Cập nhật bài thi] SĐT: {phone} vừa nộp thêm video`, handle first-time vs update
Frontend: Add phone field to i18n dictionary (VI + EN) with hints, update section notes explaining partial submission
Frontend: Update ContactInfoCard + registration-form-utils + use-registration-form hook with phoneNumber state + validation
Frontend: Update RegistrationSuccessDialog to show different messages for first-time vs update (with songs added this session)
Update help text: `You can come back later with the same phone number to submit remaining songs`
E2E testing: first submission (2 songs) → creates folder, second submission (same phone, 1 song) → reuses folder, email subject is correct
